package.name: opensplat_live_mapper
package.description: Live streaming Gaussian map backend for OpenSplat, built on ROS 2 Jazzy. Implements LiveGaussianMap, SpatialBucketIndex, GaussianSpawner, GaussianScheduler, GaussianPruner, GaussianMerger, LocalOptimizer and MapExporter as described in the RTG-SLAM-inspired design spec.
